Interface IDatabaseConnectionInfo4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that provide information about the Workspace's connected database.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("7461E679-FD70-4655-B5F5-BCF5FF97064A")]
public interface IDatabaseConnectionInfo4 : IDatabaseConnectionInfo3, IDatabaseConnectionInfo2, IDatabaseConnectionInfo
